5. Lookup and enrich a domain
Lookup and enrich a domain.
Base Command
domain
Input

!awake-pcap-download hostA="10.200.103.100" hostB="10.200.103.100" portA="67" portB="68"
Human Readable Output
5. Lookup and enrich a domain
Lookup and enrich a domain.
Base Command
domain
Input
Argument Name
name: domain

outputs.description: Approximate bytes the indicator transferred AwakeSecurity.Domains.DomainWithSameRegistrant Domains with the same registrant
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.approxBytesTransferred

outputs.description: Date that the domain with the same registrant as the specified domain was registered AwakeSecurity.Domains.IntelSources Indicators of compromise from Awake Security
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.domainsWithSameRegistrant.registrationDate

outputs.description: IP addresses associated with the domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.isAlexaTopOneMillion Does the domain appear in Alexa 1 million list
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.ipAddresses

outputs.description: Is domain generation algorithm AwakeSecurity.Domains.lastSeen Last time the domain was seen
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.isDGA

outputs.description: Notability score of the domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.numAssociatedActivities Number of network activities associated with the domain
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.notabillity

outputs.description: Number of devices associated with the domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.protocols List of protocols used in the domain activities
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.numAssociatedADevices

outputs.description: Related subdomains of the specified domain AwakeSecurity.Domains.subdomains Subdomains of the specified domain
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.relatedSubdomains

outputs.description: List of devices that accessed the specified domain (maximum is 10) AwakeSecurity.Domains.totalNumDevices Total number of devices that accessed the specified domain
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.topDevices

outputs.description: Is the specified domain in allow list DBotScore.Indicator The specified domain
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Domains.whiteListed

outputs.description: Severity score of the specified domain in Cortex XSOAR DBotScore.Type Indicator type in Cortex XSOAR
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score
